## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / new country rule (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (would cause existing validation results to change)
- [ ] Docs / tooling / CI
- [ ] New language binding

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `cd core && go test ./...` and it passes.
- [ ] I have run `make build-wasm && make test-all` and they pass.
- [ ] I added/updated entries in `test_cases.json` for any logic change.
- [ ] I updated the supported-countries table in `README.md` (if applicable).
- [ ] I have not committed generated `*.wasm` binaries (they are built by `make build-wasm`).
